description: With no for: declared, rules/1 applies no automatic exact-repeat refire-suppression window: two genuine back-to-back transitions into the target state both dispatch, even though the second follows the first within what a debounce window might otherwise have suppressed.

events.note: a second genuine transition, 1900ms after the first

results.reason: no automatic dedup/cooldown window exists in this contract; each genuine transition dispatches independently unless the rule author composes for: or a condition re-check explicitly
